data.body: CHECKPOINT: Implementation complete. Changes: (1) plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md Step 7.5.4 — replaced hardcoded 'batches of 5' with MAX_AGENTS protocol (agent-batch-lifecycle.sh pre-check, handling unlimited/5/1/0 values). (2) plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml — updated 3 MAX_AGENTS eval tests from RED to GREEN (added Step 7.5.4 content to prompts, updated assertions to match new SKILL.md). Eval result: 15/15 passed (100%). AC grep check passes (no hardcoded batch-of-5 references remain).
